findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 31. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Appendix B flowchart diagram showing hierarchical relationships between record types is missing from the HTML rendering.
findings.evidence: PDF shows a visual flowchart diagram with labeled boxes (Environmental Data Record Type 1, Gear Data Record Type 7, Replicate Data Record Type 2, Species Data Record Type 3, Individual Data Record Type 4, Tag Recapture Data Record Type 9, Age Data Record Type 5) connected by lines illustrating the data hierarchy. The HTML replaces this diagram with only a bulleted text list of the record type labels and the textual description, losing the visual representation of parent-child relationships and data flow.

findings.description: The hierarchical relationship diagram from Appendix B (showing boxes with connecting lines for Environmental Data → Replicate Data → Species Data → Individual Data, plus extensions for Gear Data, Tag Recapture Data, and Age Data) is missing from the HTML. It is replaced with a flat bullet list that loses the parent-child relationship information conveyed by the diagram's connecting lines and layout.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 4 contains a box-and-line diagram showing Record Types 1→2→3→4 hierarchy with extensions (Types 7/8, 5, 9). The HTML replaces this with a flat
    list: '
  • Environmental Data Record Type 1
  • Gear Data Record Type 7
    • ...' which does not convey the hierarchical relationships.
